name: public_safety_communications_outage_redwood_rig_utl
premise: Mutual-aid crews from another county arrived with incompatible radio encryption; command needs a comms decision now. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety communications outage redwood rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make rights feel morally loud today, while utility is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Keisha Diallo
agents.identity: I am Keisha Diallo, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Mensah
agents.identity: I am Noah Mensah, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Keisha Diallo must choose under rights versus utility. What does Keisha Diallo do?
